data.title: Bitwise Research Head Says Bitcoin May Bottom Before October as July Marks Potential Trend Shift
data.description:
Bitwise Europe research head André Dragosch said July appears to be a turning point for Bitcoin as it shifts from a bear market toward a bull market. According to Odaily, Dragosch added that if semiconductor stocks reverse sharply from current levels, the U.S. Federal Reserve may respond with a more dovish stance.

Dragosch said his base-case view is that Bitcoin is likely to bottom earlier than October, which he described as the timeframe widely expected by the market.

data.title: Japan’s 30-Year Government Bond Yield Rises 2.5 Basis Points to 3.980%
data.description: Japan’s 30-year government bond yield rose 2.5 basis points to 3.980%. According to Jin10, the move marked an increase in the long-term yield.

data.title: STOCKS | Hong Kong ADR Index Rises 302 Points as U.S. Stocks Fall
data.description:
Hong Kong stock ADRs rose 302 points, or 1.32%, to 23,183 even as U.S. stocks fell, according to Ming Pao.

Hong Kong index futures in after-hours trading gained 143 points, or 0.63%, to 22,990, implying a 109-point premium to the futures level.

data.title: Uniswap V2, V3, V4, and UniswapX Launch on Robinhood Chain
data.description:
Uniswap announced on X that Uniswap v2, v3, v4, and UniswapX are now live on Robinhood Chain, a Layer 2 network under Robinhood. According to PANews, Uniswap will serve as a major public automated market maker (AMM) on Robinhood Chain and said it has full support on day one from the Uniswap Web App, wallet, and API.

Uniswap said users can now swap tokens on Robinhood Chain, provide liquidity, buy stock tokens, and program AI agents through Uniswap.

The post added that Robinhood stock tokens on the network are fully transferable and support 24/7 trading.

data.title: Ashton Kutcher to Leave Sound Ventures and Launch New VC Fund With Morgan Beller
data.description:
Investor Ashton Kutcher is leaving Sound Ventures, the venture capital firm he co-founded, and plans to start a new venture fund with former NFX partner Morgan Beller, TechCrunch reported.

According to ChainCatcher, the move is primarily driven by differences in preferred investment stages. Sound Ventures has focused on backing more mature, leading AI companies, including OpenAI and Anthropic.

Kutcher’s new fund is expected to shift toward earlier-stage investing, with a focus on foundational technology areas such as AI infrastructure, energy, and deep tech. The split was described as amicable, and Kutcher will continue to serve as an advisor to Sound Ventures.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Gold Holds Gains After Kevin Warsh Remarks Ease Fed Rate-Hike Prospects
data.description: Gold held onto gains after remarks by US Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh eased speculation the central bank may raise interest rates this year to tackle inflation, according to Bloomberg.

data.title: STOCKS | South Korean Stocks Tumble 6% as AI Jitters Hit Chipmakers
data.description:
South Korean stocks tumbled 6% as concerns about potential excess AI computing capacity sparked a selloff in chipmakers, according to Bloomberg.

The decline followed Meta Platforms Inc.’s plan to sell computing power, which raised questions about whether the industry is building too much AI capacity.

data.title: Brent Crude Erases War Premium, Slides About 40% From March Peak to $72.25
data.description:
Brent crude has erased its entire war premium, sliding roughly 40% from its March peak near $120 to trade around $72.25 on Wednesday. The retreat follows stalled diplomacy between Iran and the United States, according to BeInCrypto, as traders refocus from conflict risk to supply, demand and the broader economic outlook.

Technically, Brent has fallen back into its pre-war support zone around $68-$73, with the daily RSI below 30 for the first oversold reading since April 2025. BeInCrypto said a hold above $68 could allow a rebound toward $80, while a break below $68 would shift focus to support near $60.

data.title: Strategy and Strive Add 6,989 Bitcoin in June, BitcoinTreasuries.NET Says
data.description:
BitcoinTreasuries.NET said in a post on X that Strategy and Strive together increased their Bitcoin holdings by 6,989 BTC in June.

According to Odaily, BitcoinTreasuries.NET said the two companies accounted for nearly all Bitcoin purchases made by publicly listed companies during the month.

The post added that the funds used for the purchases mainly came from proceeds related to STRC and SATA.

data.title: STOCKS | Lime Shares Rise 4% After $174 Million IPO
data.description: Electric scooter and bike rental operator Lime rose 4% after the company and some of its shareholders raised $174 million in an initial public offering, according to Bloomberg.

data.title: Mastercard Expands RLUSD Settlement Support to Eight Blockchain Networks
data.description:
Jack McDonald outlined eight recent developments related to RLUSD, spanning payments, exchange access, cross-chain infrastructure, and regional availability. According to NS3.AI, Mastercard has expanded settlement support for RLUSD across eight blockchain networks, including the XRP Ledger.

The update also said Ripple broadened RLUSD availability in Turkey. In addition, Ripple entered Japan through SBI VC Trade following approval by the Japan Financial Services Agency.

data.title: Arcus Launches on Robinhood Chain With 24/7 Trading for 95 Tokenized Stocks and Perpetuals
data.description:
Arcus, a decentralized exchange developed by the dYdX team, has launched on Robinhood Chain, offering 24/7 trading with zero fees for 95 tokenized stocks and perpetual contracts. According to PANews, Arcus supports tokenized trading across stocks, commodities, indices, and crypto assets.

The report said all tokenized stocks on Arcus are issued by Robinhood Chain and are redeemable. These assets can be self-custodied and connected to the DeFi ecosystem.

PANews reported that Robinhood Crypto has invested in Arcus. Arcus also plans to support using tokenized stocks and crypto assets as collateral for perpetual contracts, and to offer pre-IPO trading for popular private companies such as OpenAI.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Northern Star Names Glencore’s Suresh Vadnagra CEO After Elliott Pressure
data.description: Northern Star Resources Ltd., Australia’s biggest gold miner, appointed Glencore Plc executive Suresh Vadnagra as its new chief executive officer after pressure from activist investor Elliott Investment Management LP to rebuild its management team, according to Bloomberg.

data.title: STOCKS | China National Building Material Tops Stock Connect Additions; CSOP Hang Seng Tech Sees Biggest Cut
data.description:
China National Building Material (3323) recorded the largest increase in holdings under Shanghai-Hong Kong Stock Connect and Shenzhen-Hong Kong Stock Connect, rising by 60.964 million shares, according to Ming Pao.

CSOP Hang Seng Tech (3033) saw the largest reduction in holdings, with a decrease of 104 million shares. The figures are based on HKEX Disclosure of Interests Stock Connect shareholding records for the holding date of June 30, 2026.

data.title: Emerging Asia Bonds Attract Global Funds Despite Fed Rate-Hike Fears
data.description: Foreign investors are returning to Asian emerging-market bonds despite renewed fears of Federal Reserve rate hikes, as expectations that regional central banks will keep interest rates elevated are supporting the debt’s yield appeal, according to Bloomberg.

data.title: A-Share IPOs Rise 39% in H1 2026; Net Proceeds Jump 91% to RMB 63.96 Billion
data.description: China's A-share IPO underwriting market saw shifts in the first half of 2026, with 71 companies listing, up 39.22% from 51 a year earlier, according to 36Kr, citing Choice data based on officially listed deals. Total net funds raised reached RMB 63.964 billion, up 91.25% from RMB 33.446 billion in the same period last year. Against a broader market recovery, Guotai Haitong, China International Capital Corp (CICC) and CITIC Securities led the underwriting rankings, while mid-sized brokerages such as Soochow Securities and Guojin Securities gained ground by focusing on Beijing Stock Exchange-related business.

data.title: Huatai Securities: El Niño May Lift Hydropower Output; Yalong River Generation Could Turn Positive in Main Flood Season
data.description: A Huatai Securities research note said China Southern Power Grid’s load hit a record high ahead of schedule by late May 2026, boosting market attention on extreme weather and hydropower inflows, according to 36Kr. Based on official agencies’ rainfall forecasts for main flood seasons across different regions in China and a review of how past El Niño/La Niña events affected hydropower generation during main flood seasons, the report said El Niño does not necessarily imply drier inflows that year and that hydropower generation overall tends to benefit from El Niño events. It also said that since Q2 2026, Yalong River hydropower—where high-frequency reservoir outflow data has been weak—could see year-on-year generation growth turn positive during the main flood season. Huatai added that hydropower assets currently offer attractive allocation value, with valuations at historically low levels and relatively high projected 2026 dividend yields.

data.title: Wind Data: 29 of 35 Broker “Golden Stock” Indices Rose in H1; Ping An Securities Index Up 46.51%
data.description:
Twenty-nine of the 35 broker “golden stock” indices tracked by Wind posted positive returns in the first half of 2026, with the Ping An Securities Golden Stock Index up 46.51%, according to 36Kr. The China Merchants Securities, Dongxing Securities, and Zheshang Securities golden stock indices were also among the top gainers.

On July 1, 2026—the first trading day of the second half—China’s A-share market closed higher, with the Shanghai Composite Index ending up and sectors including agriculture, forestry, animal husbandry and fishery, as well as non-bank financials, leading gains. Industry participants said they expect greater volatility in July as performance divergence within the technology sector widens, while adding they see no systemic market risk and suggesting positioning around two themes: “growth diffusion” and large-cap value.

data.title: BNB Drops Below 550 USDT with a Narrowed 0.64% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jul 02, 2026, 00:03 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 550 USDT and is now trading at 549.890015 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.64% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: AI TRENDS | xAI Launches Grok Voice Agent Builder Beta With $0.05-Per-Minute Pricing
data.description:
xAI has launched a beta version of its no-code Voice Agent Builder platform, which it says lets users create near-human voice agents using Grok Voice, priced at $0.05 per minute. According to Odaily, the platform integrates calling features, knowledge retrieval, tools, guardrails, and observability.

Voice Agent Builder is positioned as a unified interface for Grok Voice and supports use with existing phone numbers, APIs, and MCP. xAI said each account includes one free phone number.
